title: Sunglasses
description: Adds wearable sunglasses to the game.
body:
Adds wearable sunglasses to the game!
--- Adds craftable sunglasses with this recipe:
![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/P1u9z9xS/images/c5accea9a278c42c399cca756edaf8dd18c02e48.png) Punching someone with sunglasses places them somewhat gently on their head. ## Afterword Made for [BlanketCon '25](https://modfest.net/bc25)!
